name: HITL Queue Spec
execution_summary: Successfully created comprehensive HITL queue specification and CLI implementation

deliverables.description: Complete HITL queue specification with schema, reason types, SMS triggers, and resolution formats
Fully functional HITL CLI with queue management, statistics, and SMS response processing

key_decisions.decision: Used JSONL format for queue storage
key_decisions.rationale: Append-only, human-readable, easy to process line-by-line

key_decisions.decision: Defined 6 reason types covering major HITL scenarios
key_decisions.rationale: Comprehensive coverage of automated processing failure modes
Immediate for critical issues, batched for routine items to avoid notification fatigue
Reliable for V's communication style, easily extensible

testing_performed: Test item creation and listing confirmed
SMS response parsing validated with real example
dependencies_satisfied: D2.1 (Meeting ID Convention) - referenced in schema and examples
next_steps: Integration with meeting processor to generate HITL items
SMS webhook setup for automated response processing

technical_notes.sms_patterns: Pattern-based parsing with fallback to manual review
